A.evidence: Faithful prose with clean markdown heading hierarchy and cross-ref anchors; display summation renders as correct LaTeX. But all 3 tables are structurally mangled: label column merged with Mean ('Angular Velocity (deg/s) 62.0006' in one cell) and p10/p75/p95/max collapsed into a single cell.

B.evidence: Accurate prose, clean LaTeX for both the summation and inline $\approx 200V$; Tables 2 and 3 are perfect markdown. However Table 1 (Position/Speed/Orientation/Angular Velocity) is dropped entirely, and section headings are plain text rather than markdown headers.

C.evidence: All 3 tables present and structurally correct, but oscilloscope readout ('H1 / 10.0V / M Pos: 2.880s') and scattered plot-axis labels are hallucinated into the body text, disrupting reading order; the summation equation is lost as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->'.

D.evidence: Clean headings and reading order with no figure garbage; Tables 2 and 3 correct but Table 1's Angular Velocity row is shifted/merged. Text has errors: 'roboup@gmail.com', 'possibly diag a fault', and a dropped clause ('to achieve this, but we should be able'); summation LaTeX present but subscript garbled to 'est scenarions'.
